title: At the Cave Mouth
description: First time entering a dragon-gated dungeon. Everyone is brave in slightly different ways.

steps.text: The air at the cave mouth was warmer than the air behind them by exactly the margin a person should pay attention to.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Does it smell like dragon in there?

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: How does a dragon smell, exactly.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Like a forge left on overnight. And something else. Mint, I think.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: But we are not going to.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: I am writing this down in case we do not come out.

steps.text: They went in. The air got warmer. The margin widened.
